parts.answer: Line 1 should be Counter Line 2 should be < 50 Line 3 should be RandUp(0,100) // RandUp(-1,100) Line 4 should be Counter ← Counter + 1 Counter ← WHILE Counter < 50 DO NumRand[Counter} ← RandUp(0, 100) Counter ← Counter + 1 ENDWHILE three from: FOR Counter ← 0 TO 49 // FOR Counter ← 1 TO 50 NumRand[Counter] ← RandUp(0,100) / RandUp(-1,100) NEXT // NEXT Counter one mark for sample, one mark for reason max four Normal Sample any password with at least 8 characters and one special character e.g. Password! Reason to test that normal data is accepted and processed correctly Erroneous Sample any value that would be rejected e.g. secret Reason to test that erroneous data is rejected Reason to test that Secret? which has 7 characters is rejected and Secret?? which has 8 characters is accepted Boundary Sample 1 – Secret? Boundary Sample 2 – Secret?? 0478/23 October/November 2021 two methods, one mark for method, one mark for description max four E.g. Asking the user to enter the password twice and comparing the values (1) only accepting the data if both entries are identical (1) Displaying the password as it is entered (1) so the user can put right errors have been made as the password was typed (1) 0478/23 October/November 2021 One mark for each correct column Counter Pass Mark Help OUTPUT 0 0 1 1 88 2 24 3 2 60 4 30 5 3 44 6 17 7 25 8 22 9 4 54 10 6 999 0.4 Extra Help

WEIGHT – Number, comparisons / calculations may be required PRICE – Currency, the price is in dollars / money CODE – Text, no calculations required, could be numbers or characters STOCK – Number, comparisons / calculations may be required 0478/23 October/November 2021

Field: CATEGORY MANUFACTURER PRICE CODE WEIGHT Table: COMPUTER COMPUTER COMPUTER COMPUTER COMPUTER Sort: Show:      Criteria: < 2.5 or: One mark for correct rows Field and Table One mark for correct Show row One mark for correct Criteria row
